nodes.name: Webhook: Receive Upload
nodes.notes: Entry point. Accepts multipart/form-data POST with binary PDF file + student metadata. Test via curl or Postman.

nodes.name: Code: Validate & Prep
nodes.notes: Validates required fields, generates unique plan_id. Throws descriptive errors on missing data.

nodes.name: Google Drive: Store PDF
nodes.notes: Stores PDF in Google Drive for audit trail. Replace REPLACE_WITH_YOUR_DRIVE_FOLDER_ID with your actual folder ID.

nodes.name: Code: Merge Drive Meta
nodes.notes: Re-merges student metadata with Google Drive file info so subsequent nodes have full context.

nodes.name: Extract From File: PDF Text
nodes.notes: Extracts raw text from the PDF binary. Output field: $json.text — this is passed to the AI for parsing.

nodes.name: Code: Merge PDF Text
nodes.notes: Merges extracted PDF text with student meta. Truncates to 12k chars to avoid token overflow. Throws error if text is too short.

nodes.name: OpenAI: Extract Topics
nodes.notes: First AI call. Extracts structured topics, subtopics, difficulty, and exam dates from raw syllabus text.

nodes.name: Code: Parse Topics Response
nodes.notes: Parses the AI JSON response. Validates at least some topics were extracted. Merges with student metadata.

nodes.name: OpenAI: Generate Schedule
nodes.notes: Second AI call. Generates the full 15-week study schedule from extracted topics. Uses StudyBuddy persona.

nodes.name: Code: Build Full Schedule
nodes.notes: Parses schedule AI response, computes actual calendar dates for each of the 15 weeks (starting from next Monday), merges all data.

nodes.name: Google Sheets: Store Plan
nodes.notes: Stores complete student record + full schedule JSON in 'Students' sheet. Replace REPLACE_WITH_YOUR_SHEET_ID with actual spreadsheet ID.

nodes.name: Code: Split Into 15 Weeks
nodes.notes: Splits the full_schedule array into 15 individual items so the SplitInBatches node can loop over each week.

nodes.name: SplitInBatches: Week Loop
nodes.notes: Iterates one week at a time. Each pass creates one Google Calendar event. Connect 'loop' output back to Calendar node.

nodes.name: Google Calendar: Create Event
nodes.notes: Creates one calendar event per week. Color-coded by difficulty: red=hard (8-10), yellow=medium (5-7), green=easy (1-4). Has reminder 24h before and 30min popup.

nodes.name: Code: Post-Loop Summary
nodes.notes: Runs after the SplitInBatches loop is done. Collects summary data for the welcome email.

nodes.name: OpenAI: Write Welcome Email
nodes.notes: Generates the one-time welcome email using StudyBuddy persona.

parameters.subject: =🎓 Your 15-Week {{ $('Code: Post-Loop Summary').first().json.course_name }} Study Plan is LIVE!

nodes.name: Gmail: Send Welcome Email
nodes.notes: Sends the AI-generated welcome email to the student. Update replyTo with your actual email.

parameters.responseBody:
={
  "success": true,
  "plan_id": "{{ $('Code: Build Full Schedule').first().json.plan_id }}",
  "message": "Your 15-week study plan for {{ $('Code: Build Full Schedule').first().json.course_name }} is ready!",
  "student": "{{ $('Code: Build Full Schedule').first().json.student_name }}",
  "calendar_events_created": 15,
  "welcome_email_sent": true,
  "first_week_starts": "{{ $('Code: Build Full Schedule').first().json.next_email_date }}"
}

nodes.name: Respond to Webhook
nodes.notes: Returns JSON success response to the upload form. Includes plan_id for client-side tracking.

nodes.name: IF: Error Check
nodes.notes: Optional error routing. Connect any node's error output here to handle failures gracefully.

nodes.name: Respond: Error
nodes.notes: Returns structured error response to the upload form.

nodes.name: Cron: Every Sunday 8AM
nodes.notes: Fires every Sunday at 8:00 AM (configured for Asia/Kolkata timezone in workflow settings). Change cron expression as needed: 0 8 * * 0

nodes.name: Google Sheets: Read All Students
nodes.notes: Reads all rows from the Students sheet. We will filter to active plans in the next node.

nodes.name: Code: Filter Active Students
nodes.notes: Filters students who are active and due for an email. Parses schedule JSON and enriches with current week data.

nodes.name: IF: Any Students?
nodes.notes: Stops the workflow gracefully if no students need emails today.

nodes.name: OpenAI: Generate Weekly Email
nodes.notes: Generates personalized weekly prep email. Runs for EACH active student. If you have many students, consider batching to respect rate limits.

nodes.name: Code: Merge Email Content
nodes.notes: Merges AI-generated email HTML with student metadata for sending.

nodes.name: Gmail: Send Weekly Email
nodes.notes: Sends weekly prep email to the student. Subject includes week number and course name for easy filtering.

nodes.name: Code: Calc Next Week
nodes.notes: Computes the next week number and next email date. Marks plan as 'completed' after week 15.

nodes.name: Google Sheets: Update Progress
nodes.notes: Updates current_week, status, and next_email_date after sending. Status becomes 'completed' after week 15.

nodes.name: IF: Semester Complete?
nodes.notes: Routes to completion email if this was the last week (week 15).

nodes.name: OpenAI: Completion Email
nodes.notes: Generates a celebratory semester completion email after week 15.

parameters.subject: =🎉 You Did It! 15 Weeks of {{ $('Code: Calc Next Week').first().json.course_name }} Complete!

nodes.name: Gmail: Send Completion Email
nodes.notes: Sends celebratory completion email after the 15th week.

nodes.name: Code: Log Success
nodes.notes: Logs successful email send. In production, you could write to a Logs sheet here for audit trail.
